_comment: THE TV CABINETS — each is a pixel TV faceplate PNG with an EMPTY screen; the media pipeline (media_panel.gd) plays the channel/video through the 'screen' rect (fractions of the shown cabinet). The screen content is NEVER baked into the art (same law as the radio LCD). Adding a TV = drop a PNG + a row; 'w'/'h' set the cabinet aspect, 'screen' is where the picture goes.
